subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one! Blessed art thou, for thou hast entered into the bosom of the training of God and drunk the cup of knowledge while thou art young in age
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها العزیزه طوبی لک بما دخلت فی حضن تربیه الله و شربت کاس العرفان و انت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @firmness in the Covenant
